response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the minimum seniority requirement with 16+ years of software engineering experience and a current Staff-level IC role, demonstrating strong technical leadership and mentoring. However, he significantly lacks the core expertise this role demands: there is no demonstrated AI/ML platform expertise, no recognized products built with AI, and no Master's/PhD in an AI-related field. His recent MCP work is peripheral to AI strategy. While technically accomplished, he is not the strategist this AI-focused principal role requires.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with 16+ years in software engineering and current Staff-level director-equivalent role
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through mentoring, refactoring dojos, teaching workshops, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Polyglot depth across multiple technical domains (full-stack, infrastructure, DevOps, embedded systems) with proven ability to pick the right tool
concerns: Minimal AI/ML expertise: only recent peripheral involvement with MCP (Model Context Protocol) with no demonstrated deep AI strategy knowledge or recognized expertise
No demonstrated products or platforms specifically built with AI—background is in direct mail automation, pricing optimization, GIS, and data integration
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; educational background is in general Computer Science and Photography/Video—missing preferred AI qualifications

key_factors.factor: AI strategy expertise and demonstrated AI products
15+ years seniority and director-level IC status
Cloud platform expertise vs. general infrastructure knowledge
